scripts.build:release-app: set -e; CI=false CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$PWD/src-tauri/target" tauri build --bundles app; SRC="$PWD/src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/My Digital Library.app"; if [ ! -d "$SRC" ]; then echo "Not found: $SRC"; exit 1; fi; rm -rf "release/My Digital Library.app"; mkdir -p release; cp -R "$SRC" "release/"; codesign --force --deep --sign - "release/My Digital Library.app"; xattr -cr "release/My Digital Library.app"; echo "Updated: release/My Digital Library.app"
